MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dina D. Nobles, Esq., HANCOCK ROTHERT & BUNSHOFT, 415-981-5550, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party counsel for Alac Dean. Eric Miller, Esq., MILLER & BECK, (415) 924-9154, appeared on behalf of plaintiff Anthony Espinoza. Alac Dean appeared on his own behalf.

The motion to withdraw as attorney of record was withdrawn by request of the moving party. Off calendar without prejudice to renew the motion. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

MOTION Not Of Mot And Mot To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-08-2002 Continued To Apr-23-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dina D. Nobles, Esq. of HANCOCK ROTHERT & BUNSHOFT LLP 981-5550 moving to be relieved as counsel of record for defendant ALAC DEAN dba Alac Dean Construction
Eric D. Miller, Esq. of MILLER & BECK 956-5400 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court continued this matter for further argument to APRIL 23, 2002. Ms. Nobles' client is ordered to be present on April 23rd. She is to draft an order to this effect. Notice of continuance of this hearing is waived in open court.
(JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
